text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell executed with hidden window and an encoded command, followed by extensive creation of system certificate registry keys. The encoded command starts with a PowerShell version check, a common tactic in malicious scripts.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell -enc",
    "powershell -w 1",
    "powershell -noP",
    "registry key creation for SystemCertificates",
    "registry key creation for EnterpriseCertificates"
  ]
}
